title: Sticker Galaxy Arcade Game Manifest
description: Canonical schema for Sticker Galaxy Arcade game manifests (v2). All [REQUIRED] fields must be present and valid before the Galactic Council will approve your submission. Run `npm run validate` from arcade-starter to check locally.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI. Include for editor autocomplete: "$schema": "https://stickergalaxy.io/schemas/arcade-manifest/v2.json"

name.description: [REQUIRED] Display name shown in the Arcade, leaderboards, result screens, and the sector map. Keep it short and punchy. ≤24 chars recommended, hard limit 60.

slug.description: [REQUIRED] URL-safe identifier for your game. Used in deeplinks (t.me/bot/play?startapp=arcade_<slug>), API paths, and internal tracking. Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only. Must start with a letter. 3–33 chars total. Cannot be changed after first publish without losing leaderboard history.

version.description: [REQUIRED] Semantic version of your game build (semver: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Bump PATCH for bug fixes, MINOR for new features, MAJOR for breaking changes. The Council records this on each approval so changelogs are trackable.

studio.description: [REQUIRED] Studio identity block. Must include a display name and at least one contact method.

name.description: [REQUIRED] Your studio's display name shown in the Arcade listing.

contact_telegram.description: Telegram handle for the review contact (@username). Required if contact_email is absent.

contact_email.description: Email address for the review contact. Required if contact_telegram is absent.

website.description: Studio website URL (HTTPS only). Optional but recommended.

ton_wallet.description: TON wallet address for bounty and revenue-share payouts (EQ.../UQ... + 46 base64url chars). Required when wager_enabled=true, trophy_enabled=true, or cosmetic_items is non-empty. You receive 70% of all in-game purchase revenue. Cannot be changed after first payout.

description.description: [REQUIRED] One-paragraph pitch shown in the Arcade listing. 20–500 chars. Tell players what makes your game fun, not just what it is.

category.description: [REQUIRED] Game category for Arcade browsing and recommendations. Pick the closest fit. 'other' is allowed but reduces discoverability.

genre.description: Legacy genre field from manifest v1. Kept for backwards compatibility. Prefer 'category' for new submissions.

sector.description: The Sticker Galaxy sector your game belongs to (e.g. cantina-district, dagobah, coruscant). Sets your visual and lore context in the sector map. Ask @hollowtradr for the current sector list.

cover_image_url.description: [REQUIRED] HTTPS URL to your game's cover art shown in the Arcade listing and share cards. Must be .png, .jpg/.jpeg, or .webp. Recommended size: 1200×630 (OG card ratio). File must be publicly accessible without auth.

play_url.description: [REQUIRED] Production HTTPS URL where your game is deployed. The host launches your game in an iframe at this URL with ?session_token=... appended. Must be publicly accessible.

url.description: Alias for play_url (v1 compat). If both are present, play_url takes precedence.

sandbox_url.description: Optional staging URL used by Council reviewers during approval. If omitted, reviewers use play_url. Useful for pointing reviewers at a feature branch before promoting to production.

max_score.description: [REQUIRED] Realistic maximum score a skilled (but not superhuman) human player can achieve. NOT 99999. Get this wrong and players earn 1 midi per run. Playtest with at least 10 sessions. Halve or double after the first week of telemetry if the median score falls outside 40–70% of max_score.

min_play_duration_seconds.description: Minimum seconds a single run takes before a score can be submitted. Used for midi-per-second fair-play calibration. Prevents zero-second score farming. Default: 5.

play_duration_range_seconds.description: [min, max] seconds for a single run. Used for midi-per-second fair-play calibration alongside min_play_duration_seconds.

supports.description: Opt-in feature flags. 'leaderboard' enables persistent rankings. 'daily_seed' enables Daily Challenge (requires seeded PRNG + fixed-step physics — see §7 of MINIGAME_BUILDER_GUIDE). 'ghost_replay' enables replay sharing. 'wallet_payments' enables in-game TON purchases (requires studio.ton_wallet). 'share_to_story' enables the share-to-story viral loop.

min_sdk_version.description: Minimum @stickergalaxy/sdk-core version required to run this game. The host rejects session tokens from older SDK versions. Default: '1.0.0'.

tags.description: Up to 5 freeform tags for discovery (e.g. 'endless', 'one-tap', 'pixel-art'). Keep them descriptive and concise.

nsfw.description: Set true if your game contains content that isn't suitable for all ages. NSFW games receive reduced promotion and may be restricted on certain server types. Default: false.

perfect_score_achievable.description: Set true only if a flawless run can hit max_score exactly. Enables the Exceptional Eight leaderboard rule. Default: false.

trophy_enabled.description: Opt into monthly leaderboard trophies (gold/silver/bronze). Set false if your game has no persistent leaderboard. Requires studio.ton_wallet when true.

wager_enabled.description: Set true to enable player-vs-player midi wagering. Requires additional Council review and studio.ton_wallet.

esport_tier.description: Set true if your game implements the esport contract: seeded PRNG + fixed-step physics + input recording (see MINIGAME_BUILDER_GUIDE §7). Enables Daily Challenge mode and esport leaderboard eligibility.

cosmetic_items.description: In-game cosmetic items available for purchase. Each item must have zero gameplay effect. Requires studio.ton_wallet.

item_id.description: Unique identifier for this cosmetic item. Lowercase letters, digits, underscores. Cannot be changed after first purchase.

name.description: Display name shown in the in-game shop.

description.description: Short description. Must mention that it has zero gameplay effect.

price_ton.description: Price in TON. Keep orders of magnitude reasonable — 0.05–2.0 TON is the typical range.

icon_url.description: HTTPS URL to the item's icon (png/jpg/webp). 256×256 recommended.

studio_trophies.description: Custom achievement trophies defined by your studio. Separate from the monthly leaderboard trophies managed by the Arcade.

trophy_id.description: Unique trophy identifier. Cannot be changed after first award.

condition.description: Machine-readable condition string. Supported formats: 'first_win', 'plays_cumulative:<N>', 'score_single_run:>:<N>'. Ask @hollowtradr for the full condition DSL.

tournament.description: Optional monthly tournament config. Omit entirely if you don't want a tournament.

entry_fee_ton.description: TON entry fee per tournament enrollment. 0 = free entry.

prize_distribution.description: Prize rules keyed by rank or rank range.

value_ton.description: TON payout amount. Required when prize_type is 'ton_payout'.

localization.description: Optional localization overrides for name and description. Keys are BCP-47 language codes (e.g. 'ru', 'zh-Hans', 'es'). Values are objects with 'name' and/or 'description' string fields.

examples.name: Swamp Runner
examples.description: Dodge obstacles through the Dagobah swamp in an endless runner where every Midi earned goes straight to your wallet.
